title: Ransom Canyon season 2 ending explained: are Staten and Quinn back together, who is Yancy's secret wife, Double K and Fuller Ranch feud explained and possible season 3 predictions
summary: Dan offers Kit a "start over" opportunity, claiming that he knows of a ranching job in Wyoming that would get Kit back into the work he loves so much — and away from Lucas and Lauren. "Everything you touch turns to sh*t"…
